reviews.review_msg: I can't stand reading the complaining of other students who refused to so much as read for this class and then expect to have high marks doled out. This TA makes you work but surprise it's a 3rd year course!
He wants you to think and geez, well you are in university, hmmm.  A bit biased to the left I think but overall, you learn a lot from him.  Not a class you can coast by.

i found his tutorial very useless, and all the things he said does not relate to the lecture, plus i dont know why ppl think he is useful, well, he was easy to our presentation, but he was pretty strict on our essays
I was really nervous in my first year and Clayton made the tutorial discussions so relaxed. He was very helpful with my writing. Overall a good experience.
This TA actually cares. What a shock! Discussions get kind of off topic sometimes and also a hard marker!

I disagree with the other one. Clayton was totally helpful TA, very approachable and  friendly with students, edgy sense of humour and funny stories. He pushes your boundaries and challenges you to think. I went to him several times for help with my assignments, essays he was always helpful. I wish I could say the same for the prof. This course suc
good TA...knowledgable and interesting....but not very approachable or friendly
